name: Sameer Sharma
education: Master of Science (M.S.), Computer Science from North Carolina State University; Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.), Computer Science from Manipal Institute of Technology
headline: Senior Software Developer at Microsoft
about:
I completed Masters in Computer Science from NCSU, NC. I am currently working as Senior Software Developer at Microsoft. I have work experience of 5 years at IBM. I have four years prior work experience in Software Development and Security domain at RSA, Security Division of EMC.
I am interested in software development positions through which I can use my technical skills and past experience to gain comprehensive understanding of software domain and to achieve corporate goals.

currentPositions.description:
➢ Develop new features and added new data points/signals to the data processing pipeline for enhancing the fraud detection for MS Sign-Ins
➢ Provide location-based signals for the Sign-Ins to enhance security and drive value customers  
➢ Designed and built safety gates for all external data sources consumed by PSI services like location, browser session and many other data types. Built Machine Learning pipelines running on Spark/Synapse to access data quality before consuming any external data
➢ Monitor the health of PSI services and make sure applications are robust and reliable. Responsible for making sure these applications have 100% availability and no sign-in fails due to service downtime or failures, thereby ensuring quality of service to the customer. PSI serves millions of sign-in calls per hour each day

experiences.title: Senior Software Developer
experiences.jobDescription:
IBM Systems - Z Anomaly Analysis (ZAA)
•   ZAA aims at reducing mainframe outages and their business impacts via near real time ingestion and curation of large amounts of structured and unstructured operational data such as DB2 and CICS  
•   Enhanced ZAA anomaly detection algorithm to run specific model based on KPI and enabled execution for specific KPI resulting in more accurate anomaly detection and better performance 
•   Accelerated  performance  and  implemented  parallel  processing  in  Apache  Spark  application  which  decreased processing more than 20 folds enabling ZAA to detect anomaly in real time 
•   Spearheaded the development of testing framework for Java and Scala code base bringing up unit test coverage from 0 to more than 60% in one year

experiences.title: Full Stack Developer
experiences.jobDescription:
IBM Marketplace – Universal Master catalog (UMC)
• Aggregated, Transformed and Maintained consistent data from more than 20 IBM systems making +7M APIs calls to provide the single, official IBM product catalog, and made it available to internal and external consumers 
• Developed and enhanced performance of UMC services which comprise of Aggregation and Read APIs as well as Task Scheduler and Runner to transform product information with ZERO downtime 
• UMC is high performing APIs with MEAN based architecture which uses Travis and IBM Cloud for deployment purposes and leverage RabbitMQ, NewRelic, SonarQube and LogEntries for supervision and logging 
UMC Key Performance Metrics: 
• 10M total API calls at ~17ms per call (All UMC Services) with 500K 3rd Party API calls everyday 
• 2005 Offerings in 15 languages/56 locales representing +255,000 Offering Pages 
• Deployed in 4 strategically selected geographical locations in Kube clusters with failovers 
• 1.5M API calls to build the index for IBM Search 
• Less than 5 minutes of downtime in year 2019-20
experiences.jobLocation: Durham County, North Carolina, United States

experiences.title: Cognitive Software Developer
experiences.jobDescription:
Watson Health - Flexible Analytics  
•    Enabled Analytics Engine medical claims data mining methodologies to run on Spark resulting in better performance, load balancing and fault tolerance 
•    Developed Spark application that can be triggered through REST APIs built on Java Spring framework using Gradle and Ansible for deployment. Setup CI/CD pipeline for product using Jenkins and IBM cloud 
•    Implemented SMART on FHIR lightweight web applications to run on Electronic Health Record (EHR) systems 
•    Integrated Insights on Patient Data (IPD) Watson APIs with SMART app to generate and visualize data insights on Longitudinal Patient Records (LPR)

experiences.companyName: RSA, The Security Division of EMC
experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.jobDescription:
SA WAREHOUSE CONNECTOR (WC)
o	Enabled Big-Data analytics in SA using Hadoop HDFS and Hive integration with WC component of SA
o	Completed Proof of Concept (POC) for generating Lucene indices on log data collected by network devices to perform free text search on data present in WC Hadoop repository  

SA NETWORK DEFENSE
o	Worked on R&D project SAND (Security Analysis Network Defense) that allows user to take pre-emptive steps for protecting its network against threats
o	Implemented Java Spring based MVC framework for seamlessly interacting with third-party NAC products like Forescout and Bradford Networks from SA
o	Developed UI for SAND in SA using ExtJS to facilitate real-time rendering of dynamic data produced by NAC tool

SECURITY ANALYTICS (SA) UI DEVELOPMENT
o	Designed and developed UI for Warehouse Connector in SA using ExtJS and Java Spring MVC architecture
o	Was part of Four successful releases of SA over a time period of two years 

RSA ENVISION IMAGING LAB
o	Developed hardware images for Envision, one of the premier product of RSA, for two releases that were received well by customers 
o	Spearheaded image lab set up for Envision in Bedford, US the headquarter of RSA
o	Performed knowledge transfer for Bedford team and held trainings to familiarize CE and Sales team with new feature

recommendationsReceived.description: Sameer is one of the very few people I have worked in my career who has an incredible eye for details. He looks beyond his expected task and very eager to understand the bigger picture before taking it up. His sincerity in having things done in timely fashion saved the team we were working together in multiple situation. He would be an asset to any employer for sure.

summary: Sameer Sharma is currently a Senior Software Engineer at Microsoft, working within a large, mature enterprise context on identity and security-related engineering problems. His posts focus on recruiting and career updates, with a clear emphasis on modernizing ML platforms to protect user identities from fraud and compromise—melding cybersecurity priorities with applied AI/ML. The tone is professional, concise, and enthusiastic, often featuring calls-to-action for hiring and network referrals rather than deep technical exposition. He signals expertise in identity, security, and machine learning platform engineering and frames his content around high-impact problem solving and platform modernization. Notable patterns include frequent hiring outreach, concise role announcements, and an emphasis on real-world impact (fraud prevention, identity protection) over theoretical discussion. Through these updates he demonstrates both hands-on engineering credibility and an active role in talent-building and community engagement within his domain.
